articulos.headline: World Cup Daily LIVE: Emotional Neymar inspired by Lewis Hamilton; USMNT in action
articulos.description: We continue the final round of group stage matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with the USMNT and Germany among the teams in action.

articulos.headline: Could South Korea change manager after Group A disappointment?
articulos.description: Could South Korea change manager after Group A disappointment?

articulos.headline: Spain's Nico Williams: I'm ready to start against Uruguay
articulos.description: Winger Nico Williams said he's ready to join teammate Lamine Yamal in Spain's starting 11 in their crucial Group H game with Uruguay on Friday.

articulos.headline: Don Hutchison needed a hug after Scotland's loss to Brazil
articulos.description: Don Hutchison needed a hug after Scotland's loss to Brazil

articulos.headline: USMNT World Cup bracket scenarios, odds to advance, predicted path to knockouts
articulos.description: Who will Team USA face in the World Cup knockout rounds? What's the likely path? What are the odds? What do projection models say?

articulos.headline: Every team's championship, group odds for the 2026 World Cup
articulos.description: Odds for every team to advance from its group through the knockout stage and to win the 2026 World Cup.

articulos.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articulos.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

articulos.headline: Italian soccer prez Gravina, Buffon quit after World Cup failure
articulos.description: Italy's soccer federation president resigned amid political pressure on Thursday, two days after the national team failed to qualify for a third consecutive World Cup.

articulos.headline: Why didn't Italy qualify for the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
articulos.description: Gab Marcotti and Julien Laurens react to Italy not qualifying for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articulos.headline: Italy's soccer chief told to quit after latest World Cup failure
articulos.description: Italy's sports minister has called on the country's soccer federation (FIGC) president Gabriele Gravina to resign after the four-time world champions failed to qualify for a third successive World Cup on Tuesday.

articulos.headline: 2026 World Cup: Which 48 teams qualified for the tournament?
articulos.description: The race to qualify for the 2026 FIFA World Cup is complete. Here's how it all went down across the globe.

articulos.headline: Italy have themselves to blame for third straight World Cup miss
articulos.description: We don't need think pieces or inquests into Italy's failure to qualify for a third straight World Cup; in the end, it came down to bad decisions and bad performances, like it always does.

articulos.headline: Could Morocco beat Brazil in Group C at the World Cup?
articulos.description: Sam Ogunleye and Ed Dove discuss the strength of Morocco's squad as well as the potential to defeat group favourites Brazil.

articulos.headline: New Adidas World Cup jerseys rated: Argentina, Mexico, Spain
articulos.description: Adidas has released a huge batch of home kits for 22 countries, many of whom have either qualified or still hope to qualify for the FIFA 2026 World Cup.

articulos.headline: Messi: It's a joy to continue at Inter Miami
articulos.description: Lionel Messi says he's "very happy" to continue at Inter Miami after signing a new deal with the club.

articulos.headline: Carlo Ancelotti speaks about life as Brazil's head coach
articulos.description: Carlo Ancelotti is "having a great time" living in Brazil and managing the national team ahead of the 2026 World Cup.

articulos.headline: Raphinha admits he was tempted by a move to Saudi Arabia
articulos.description: Raphinha speaks about a transfer offer from Saudi Arabia before Hansi Flick took over Barcelona in 2024.
